response.justification: Maria is an experienced, versatile engineer with strong web and systems-adjacent background, but her profile does not match this role's core requirement of deep, current C++ expertise. Her only professional C++ work was a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; her recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms. She lacks industrial automation domain experience, MQTT/OPC UA protocol work, and any exposure to IEC 62443 or Secure Development Lifecycle practices, all of which are central to this position.
strengths: High-performance, low-latency systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Dunnhumby, handling millions of requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and mentoring/workshop experience
Event-driven architecture and distributed systems exposure via GISCollective and microservices work
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience (~7 months, over a decade ago); recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 / SDL security background
No demonstrated Azure or message-broker-based large-scale application experience as required by the role

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent hands-on C++/STL experience
